data.description: After copying your access token from Credentials above, paste it here to get your available companies and you can copy the GlobalCompanyId you want to use in requests below.

availableCompanies.title: Available Companies
availableCompanies.description: Select a company from the dropdown and copy its globalCompanyId:

data.tip: 💡 Tip: After copying the globalCompanyId, click "Try it" on any API endpoint below and paste the ID into the globalCompanyId field.
